ddls:
CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the institution (public/private) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the institution */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the institution was established */,
  "accreditation_status" TEXT /* Accreditation status of the institution */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students currently enrolled */,
  "total_faculty" INTEGER /* Total number of faculty members */,
  "online_programs" INTEGER /* Indicates if the institution offers online programs */,
  "campus_size" INTEGER /* Size of the campus in acres */,
  "endowment" REAL /* Total endowment of the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_institutions_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES institution_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_institutions_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tuition_fees" (
  "tuition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tuition record */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution */,
  "academic_year" TEXT /* Academic year for the tuition amount */,
  "tuition_amount" REAL /* Tuition and fees amount */,
  "in_state_tuition" REAL /* Tuition amount for in-state students */,
  "out_of_state_tuition" REAL /* Tuition amount for out-of-state students */,
  "international_tuition" REAL /* Tuition amount for international students */,
  "room_and_board" REAL /* Cost of room and board for students */,
  "books_and_supplies" REAL /* Average cost of books and supplies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tuition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tuition_fees_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollment" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution */,
  "academic_year" TEXT /* Academic year for the enrollment count */,
  "student_count" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled */,
  "full_time_students" INTEGER /* Number of full-time students */,
  "part_time_students" INTEGER /* Number of part-time students */,
  "international_students" INTEGER /* Number of international students */,
  "graduate_students" INTEGER /* Number of graduate students */,
  "undergraduate_students" INTEGER /* Number of undergraduate students */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollment_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "acceptance_rates" (
  "acceptance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each acceptance rate record */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution */,
  "academic_year" TEXT /* Academic year for the acceptance rate */,
  "acceptance_rate" REAL /* Acceptance rate percentage */,
  "applicants" INTEGER /* Total number of applicants */,
  "admitted_students" INTEGER /* Number of admitted students */,
  "yield_rate" REAL /* Percentage of admitted students who enrolled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("acceptance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_acceptance_rates_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "graduation_rates" (
  "graduation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each graduation rate record */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution */,
  "academic_year" TEXT /* Academic year for the graduation rate */,
  "graduation_rate" REAL /* Graduation rate percentage */,
  "graduates" INTEGER /* Total number of graduates */,
  "transfer_out_rate" REAL /* Percentage of students who transferred out */,
  "retention_rate" REAL /* Percentage of students who continue to the next academic year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("graduation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graduation_rates_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the academic year */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the academic year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the academic year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institution_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the institution type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the institution is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the institution is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_aid" (
  "aid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial aid record */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution */,
  "academic_year" TEXT /* Academic year for the financial aid amount */,
  "aid_amount" REAL /* Total financial aid amount provided */,
  "pell_grant_recipients" INTEGER /* Number of students receiving Pell Grants */,
  "loan_recipients" INTEGER /* Number of students receiving loans */,
  "average_aid_per_student" REAL /* Average financial aid per student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_aid_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_demographics" (
  "demographics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student demographics record */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution */,
  "academic_year" TEXT /* Academic year for the demographics data */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of genders among students */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of ethnicities among students */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of student ages */,
  "marital_status_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of marital statuses among students */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_demographics_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty member */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution */,
  "faculty_name" TEXT /* Name of the faculty member */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the faculty member belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the faculty member */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the faculty member */,
  "phd_holders" INTEGER /* Indicates if the faculty member holds a Ph.D. */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the faculty member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic program */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the academic program */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department offering the program */,
  "degree_level" TEXT /* Level of the degree offered (e.g., Bachelor's, Master's) */,
  "program_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the program in years */,
  "program_enrollment" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled in the program */,
  "program_accreditation" TEXT /* Accreditation status of the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research" (
  "research_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution */,
  "research_topic" TEXT /* Topic of the research project */,
  "funding_amount" REAL /* Amount of funding received */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the research project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the research project */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "collaborators" TEXT /* Names of collaborators */,
  "publications" INTEGER /* Number of publications resulting from the research */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("research_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)
